sentences.pinyin: nǐ jīntiān chī zǎofàn le ma?
sentences.english: Did you eat breakfast today?

sentences.pinyin: wǒ měitiān zǎoshang qī diǎn qǐchuáng.
sentences.english: I get up at seven every morning.

sentences.pinyin: nǐ zhù zài nǎlǐ?
sentences.english: Where do you live?

sentences.pinyin: chāoshì jǐ diǎn guānmén?
sentences.english: What time does the supermarket close?

sentences.pinyin: jīntiān tiānqì hěn hǎo.
sentences.english: The weather is nice today.

sentences.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng qù lǐfà.
sentences.english: I want to get a haircut.

sentences.pinyin: qǐngwèn xǐshǒujiān zài nǎlǐ?
sentences.english: Excuse me, where is the restroom?

sentences.pinyin: wǒ yào qù yàodiàn mǎi yào.
sentences.english: I need to go to the pharmacy to buy medicine.

sentences.pinyin: nǐ zhōumò yǒu shénme dǎsuàn?
sentences.english: What are your plans for the weekend?

sentences.pinyin: wǒ jiā lí xuéxiào hěn jìn.
sentences.english: My home is close to the school.

sentences.pinyin: nǐ néng bāng wǒ ná yīxià ma?
sentences.english: Can you help me hold this?

sentences.pinyin: tā měitiān zuò dìtiě shàngbān.
sentences.english: He takes the subway to work every day.

sentences.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng xué zuò zhōngguó cài.
sentences.english: I want to learn to cook Chinese food.

sentences.pinyin: míngtiān wǒ yào qù kàn yīshēng.
sentences.english: Tomorrow I need to see a doctor.

sentences.pinyin: qǐngwèn zhège duōshǎo qián?
sentences.english: Excuse me, how much is this?

sentences.pinyin: nǐ xǐhuan yǎng chǒngwù ma?
sentences.english: Do you like keeping pets?

sentences.pinyin: wǒ de shǒujī méi diàn le.
sentences.english: My phone is out of battery.

sentences.pinyin: wǒmen qù gōngyuán sànbù ba.
sentences.english: Let's go for a walk in the park.

sentences.pinyin: nǐ yǒu méiyǒu língqián?
sentences.english: Do you have any change?

sentences.pinyin: wǎnshang wǒ yào xǐ yīfú.
sentences.english: I need to do laundry tonight.

sentences.hanzi: 邻居家的狗每天早上叫。
sentences.pinyin: línjū jiā de gǒu měitiān zǎoshang jiào.
sentences.english: The neighbor's dog barks every morning.

sentences.pinyin: kuàidì yǐjīng dào le.
sentences.english: The delivery has arrived.

sentences.pinyin: kōngtiáo huài le, xūyào xiū yīxià.
sentences.english: The air conditioner is broken; it needs fixing.

sentences.pinyin: nǐ dǎsuàn bān dào xīn fángzi ma?
sentences.english: Are you planning to move to a new house?

sentences.hanzi: 我每天下班以后去跑步。
sentences.pinyin: wǒ měitiān xiàbān yǐhòu qù pǎobù.
sentences.english: I go running after work every day.

sentences.pinyin: zhè fùjìn yǒu méiyǒu yínháng?
sentences.english: Is there a bank nearby?

sentences.hanzi: 周末的时候我喜欢睡懒觉。
sentences.pinyin: zhōumò de shíhou wǒ xǐhuan shuì lǎnjiào.
sentences.english: On weekends I like to sleep in.

sentences.pinyin: shuǐlóngtóu lòu shuǐ le.
sentences.english: The faucet is leaking.

sentences.pinyin: lājī yào fēnlèi rēng.
sentences.english: Garbage needs to be sorted for disposal.

sentences.hanzi: 你知道附近哪里可以充电吗？
sentences.pinyin: nǐ zhīdào fùjìn nǎlǐ kěyǐ chōngdiàn ma?
sentences.english: Do you know where I can charge my phone nearby?

sentences.hanzi: 随着生活节奏加快，越来越多人开始注重饮食健康。
sentences.pinyin: suízhe shēnghuó jiézòu jiākuài, yuèláiyuè duō rén kāishǐ zhùzhòng yǐnshí jiànkāng.
sentences.english: As the pace of life quickens, more and more people are paying attention to a healthy diet.

sentences.hanzi: 这个社区组织了很多丰富多彩的活动。
sentences.pinyin: zhège shèqū zǔzhī le hěn duō fēngfù duōcǎi de huódòng.
sentences.english: This community has organized many colorful activities.

sentences.hanzi: 城市居民的日常消费结构正经历深刻的转型。
sentences.pinyin: chéngshì jūmín de rìcháng xiāofèi jiégòu zhèng jīnglì shēnkè de zhuǎnxíng.
sentences.english: The daily consumption patterns of urban residents are undergoing a profound transformation.

sentences.hanzi: 现代人对生活品质的追求已不局限于物质层面。
sentences.pinyin: xiàndài rén duì shēnghuó pǐnzhì de zhuīqiú yǐ bù júxiàn yú wùzhì céngmiàn.
sentences.english: Modern people's pursuit of quality of life is no longer limited to the material dimension.

sentences.hanzi: 在快节奏的都市生活中，如何维系邻里关系成为社区治理的重要课题。
sentences.pinyin: zài kuài jiézòu de dūshì shēnghuó zhōng, rúhé wéixì línlǐ guānxì chéngwéi shèqū zhìlǐ de zhòngyào kètí.
sentences.english: In the fast-paced urban life, how to maintain neighborly relations has become an important issue in community governance.

sentences.hanzi: 独居老人的日常照护问题亟需全社会共同关注与解决。
sentences.pinyin: dújū lǎorén de rìcháng zhàohù wèntí jíxū quán shèhuì gòngtóng guānzhù yǔ jiějué.
sentences.english: The daily care of elderly people living alone urgently requires the attention and solutions of the whole society.

sentences.hanzi: 智能家居设备的普及正在悄然改变人们的日常起居习惯和生活方式。
sentences.pinyin: zhìnéng jiājū shèbèi de pǔjí zhèngzài qiǎorán gǎibiàn rénmen de rìcháng qǐjū xíguàn hé shēnghuó fāngshì.
sentences.english: The proliferation of smart home devices is quietly changing people's daily routines and lifestyles.

sentences.hanzi: 社区共享经济模式的兴起为日常生活中的资源配置提供了新的思路。
sentences.pinyin: shèqū gòngxiǎng jīngjì móshì de xīngqǐ wèi rìcháng shēnghuó zhōng de zīyuán pèizhì tígōng le xīn de sīlù.
sentences.english: The rise of community sharing economy models offers new approaches to resource allocation in daily life.

sentences.hanzi: 当代都市人在追求便捷高效的同时，也愈发渴望回归慢生活所带来的内心宁静与精神充实。
sentences.pinyin: dāngdài dūshì rén zài zhuīqiú biànjié gāoxiào de tóngshí, yě yùfā kěwàng huíguī màn shēnghuó suǒ dàilái de nèixīn níngjìng yǔ jīngshén chōngshí.
sentences.english: While pursuing convenience and efficiency, contemporary urban dwellers increasingly yearn for the inner peace and spiritual fulfillment that a slow life brings.

sentences.hanzi: 面对日益复杂的日常消费场景，消费者权益保护机制有待进一步完善与创新。
sentences.pinyin: miànduì rìyì fùzá de rìcháng xiāofèi chǎngjǐng, xiāofèizhě quányì bǎohù jīzhì yǒudài jìnyībù wánshàn yǔ chuàngxīn.
sentences.english: Facing increasingly complex daily consumption scenarios, consumer rights protection mechanisms need further improvement and innovation.
